seeds.title: System Update Required
seeds.body: A critical security update is available for your browser. Please install now to ensure your data remains protected.

seeds.title: Account Verification Needed
seeds.body: We detected unusual activity on your account. Please verify your identity to continue using this service.

seeds.title: Flash Sale - 90% OFF!
seeds.body: Congratulations! You've been selected for an exclusive limited-time offer. Claim your discount before it expires!

seeds.title: Session Expired
seeds.body: Your session has timed out for security reasons. Please confirm to continue browsing securely.

seeds.title: Cookie Preferences
seeds.body: We use cookies to enhance your experience. Accept all cookies to get the best experience on our website.

seeds.title: Premium Subscription
seeds.body: Upgrade to Premium for an ad-free experience and exclusive features. Start your free trial today!

seeds.title: Security Alert
seeds.body: Your connection may not be secure. Enable protection to safeguard your personal information.

seeds.title: Enable Notifications
seeds.body: Stay updated with the latest news and offers. Allow notifications to never miss important updates.
